title: Buttery British Garlic Crumble
description: A tender and buttery British dish featuring a caramelized garlic bulb in a halal-friendly crumb topping.

ingredients.name: Vegetable oil
ingredients.amount: a few drops to prevent sticking

instructions: Melt the butter and heat it in a small saucepan. Add the garlic cloves, cover, and simmer until they turn golden brown and caramelized.
Remove the garlic from the pan and let cool slightly. In another bowl, mix together the flour and salt. Gradually add the melted butter while stirring to form a crumb mixture.
Once the garlic is cooled enough to handle, break it into pieces that are similar in size to the crumb mixture. Mix them into the crumb mixture gently until evenly distributed.
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a small baking dish or mold with a few drops of oil.
Pour the cooled garlic and crumb mixture into the prepared dish, spreading it evenly. Bake for about 12-15 minutes until golden brown and crispy on top.
